label: Form table
summary: The label:field two-column form grid, minus the table.
era: Every 1999 signup form was a two-column table, bold labels right-aligned against their fields. The table left; the look stayed.

classes.name: rs-form-table
classes.role: the grid: bold right-aligned labels, fields beside; stacks below vga

classes.name: rs-form-error
classes.role: the error message line under a field

a11y: It is a grid, not a <table>, so screen readers meet label-then-field in source order. Keep <label for> on every control and tie each rs-form-error line to its field with aria-describedby.
